questions: Q1: Were all 10 implementation plan steps completed successfully?
Q2: Do all 9 verification checks (CHK-01 through CHK-09) pass?
Q3: Are there any deviations from the implementation plan?

answers.answer: All 10 implementation plan steps were completed successfully. Step 1: authored skill-content/SKILL.md and skill-content/references/commands.md. Step 2: added 'skill-content' to package.json files[]. Step 3: created src/skill/paths.ts with getSkillContentDir(). Step 4: created src/skill/show.ts with cmdShow(). Step 5: created src/skill/install.ts with cmdInstall() including three-tier target resolution, no-overwrite safety, --force mode, and atomic rollback. Step 6: created src/skill/index.ts with runSkill() router. Step 7: wired into src/index.ts (import, usage text, switch case, SKIP_AUTO_UPDATE). Step 8: added CI tarball validation in .github/workflows/publish.yml. Step 9: wrote 20 unit tests in src/skill/skill.test.ts. Step 10: ran full verification — all checks pass.
evidence: npm test: 42 tests pass (22 existing + 20 new skill tests), exit code 0
npx tsc --noEmit: exit code 0, zero type errors
node dist/index.js skill show: exits 0, prints SKILL.md content
node dist/index.js skill install --target /tmp/test: exits 0, creates hlx-cli/ with SKILL.md and references/
npm pack --dry-run: lists skill-content/SKILL.md and skill-content/references/commands.md in tarball

answers.answer: All 9 verification checks pass. CHK-01: TypeScript typecheck exits 0 with no errors. CHK-02: npm test runs build and all 42 tests pass. CHK-03: hlx skill show prints SKILL.md content with YAML frontmatter, exits 0. CHK-04: hlx skill --help shows usage with show, install, --target, --for, --force. CHK-05: install --target creates hlx-cli/ with SKILL.md and references/commands.md, byte-for-byte match confirmed. CHK-06: second install without --force exits 1 with error mentioning --force. CHK-07: install with --force overwrites successfully, exits 0. CHK-08: corrupt install (skill-content renamed) exits 1 with message containing 'npm install -g @projectxinnovation/helix-cli@latest'. CHK-09: npm pack --dry-run lists both skill-content files.
evidence: CHK-03: node dist/index.js skill show -> exit 0, output starts with '---\nname: hlx-cli'
CHK-04: node dist/index.js skill --help -> exit 0, shows all subcommands
CHK-05: install to /tmp/hlx-skill-verify-test -> SKILL.md byte-for-byte match verified
CHK-06: repeat install -> exit 1, stderr contains '--force'
CHK-08: mv skill-content -> exit 1, stderr contains reinstall instruction
CHK-09: npm pack --dry-run -> lists skill-content/SKILL.md and skill-content/references/commands.md

answers.answer: No deviations from the implementation plan. All steps followed the prescribed approach: top-level skill-content/ bundled via files[], import.meta.url path resolution, sync FS operations, inspect router pattern, flags.ts utilities, node:test + node:assert test conventions, and CI tarball grep check. The only creative decision was the specific SKILL.md content, which was authored following the workspace skill format (YAML frontmatter with name/description) and covers the full hlx CLI command surface.
evidence: src/skill/paths.ts: uses dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)) exactly as src/update/version.ts
src/skill/index.ts: follows src/inspect/index.ts router pattern with skillUsage() + switch + isHelpRequested()
src/skill/install.ts: uses getFlag/hasFlag from src/lib/flags.ts, homedir() from node:os
package.json: files[] includes 'skill-content' alongside existing dist/ entries
.github/workflows/publish.yml: grep check follows existing pattern on line 50-51

statement: Implementation complete. All 10 plan steps executed: 7 new files created (skill-content/SKILL.md, skill-content/references/commands.md, src/skill/paths.ts, src/skill/show.ts, src/skill/install.ts, src/skill/index.ts, src/skill/skill.test.ts), 3 files modified (src/index.ts, package.json, .github/workflows/publish.yml). All 9 verification checks (CHK-01 through CHK-09) pass. 42 total tests pass (22 existing + 20 new). Zero runtime dependencies added. All 8 ticket acceptance criteria are met.
